title: OptiPvP+
description: this a mod pack for pvp with a lot of optimisations
body:
this is a pvp modpack with a lot of optimisations this will improve your game play and with this modpack when your in a battle you will see your armor durability and huger saturation 



![preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6482926396e4f1dff4699a02dad03056daade11.png)![Food perview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f55fba0be71591c37db505c18c7316af958cdec.png)![mini map perview 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5f9982a4135c5a6c825cd96796bd81d6944bcc9.png)

hope u like it :)
